violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a donut cart. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The cutting board in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door reach-in and cold drawers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The floor in the dry storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Cheese and cream cheese were observed held at 46-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview with PIC, foods were just put in unit. PIC moved to another refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
At time of inspection, ambient of prep unit was 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with PIC, foods were just put in unit. All food was moved to another unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
